title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Saksoft - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Saksoft. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Surat-based team.

About Saksoft:
Saksoft is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Docker

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Surat, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Saksoft!
